name: superdev
description: Superdev — a workspace-scope-agnostic Claude Code plugin bundling 6 skills and 24 subagents for full-stack monorepo builds (PRD+design audit, design-to-Next.js, Nest.js backend, security review, prototype-to-SaaS migration, exploratory QA).

plugins.name: superdev
plugins.description: 6 production-grade skills + 24 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. Workspace-scope agnostic — hooks use path-based pnpm filters, works in any pnpm monorepo regardless of @scope. Covers PRD+design orchestration, Next.js frontend (shadcn-everywhere, view-shape contract), Nest.js backend (CASL + @Audit + Drizzle + Timescale + BullMQ), security audit, prototype-to-SaaS migration, and exploratory QA via Playwright.
